ddls:
CREATE TABLE "childcare_centres" (
  "centre_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each childcare centre */,
  "centre_name" TEXT /* Name of the childcare centre */,
  "centre_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the childcare centre */,
  "centre_contact_no" TEXT /* Contact number for the childcare centre */,
  "centre_email" TEXT /* Email address for inquiries */,
  "operating_model" TEXT /* Operational model of the centre (e.g., Private, Government) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website link for the childcare centre */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Hours during which the centre operates */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees charged by the centre */,
  "food_offered" TEXT /* Food offerings provided by the centre */,
  "government_subsidy" TEXT /* Indicates if there is a government subsidy available */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the centre's location */,
  "nearest_mrt_station" TEXT /* Nearest MRT station to the centre */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the childcare centre */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the childcare centre */,
  "level_of_care" TEXT /* Level of care provided by the centre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("centre_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "vacancies" (
  "centre_code" TEXT /* Code of the childcare centre */,
  "infant_vacancy" TEXT /* Vacancy status for infants */,
  "k1_vacancy" TEXT /* Vacancy status for K1 students */,
  "k2_vacancy" TEXT /* Vacancy status for K2 students */,
  "n1_vacancy" TEXT /* Vacancy status for N1 students */,
  "n2_vacancy" TEXT /* Vacancy status for N2 students */,
  "update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "vacancy_status" TEXT /* Standardized vacancy status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("centre_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "childcare_services" (
  "centre_code" TEXT /* Code of the childcare centre */,
  "infant_care" INTEGER /* Indicates if infant care is offered */,
  "child_care" INTEGER /* Indicates if child care is offered */,
  "student_care" INTEGER /* Indicates if student care is offered */,
  "additional_services" TEXT /* Additional services provided by the centre */,
  "transport_provision" TEXT /* Information on transport provision to/from the centre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("centre_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages_offered" (
  "centre_code" TEXT /* Code of the childcare centre */,
  "language" TEXT /* Second language offered by the centre */,
  "language_level" TEXT /* Level of language proficiency offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("centre_code", "language")
)

CREATE TABLE "subsidies" (
  "centre_code" TEXT /* Code of the childcare centre */,
  "subsidy_type" TEXT /* Type of subsidy available */,
  "subsidy_amount" REAL /* Amount of subsidy provided */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the subsidy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("centre_code", "subsidy_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_details" (
  "centre_code" TEXT /* Code of the childcare centre */,
  "contact_no" TEXT /* Contact number for the centre */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the centre */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name and title of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("centre_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_hours" (
  "centre_code" TEXT /* Code of the childcare centre */,
  "weekday_full_day" TEXT /* Full day operating hours during weekdays */,
  "weekday_halfday_am" TEXT /* Half day operating hours during weekdays in the morning */,
  "weekday_halfday_pm" TEXT /* Half day operating hours during weekdays in the afternoon */,
  "holiday_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours during holidays */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("centre_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "centre_updates" (
  "centre_code" TEXT /* Code of the childcare centre */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update made to the centre's information */,
  "number_of_records" INTEGER /* Total number of records related to the centre */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update made (e.g., contact information, program offerings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("centre_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "organisation_details" (
  "organisation_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the organisation */,
  "organisation_name" TEXT /* Name of the organisation */,
  "organisation_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the organisation */,
  "licence_number" TEXT /* Licence number of the organisation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organisation_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "parent_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the review */,
  "centre_code" TEXT /* Code of the childcare centre */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the parent */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parent_reviews_centre_code FOREIGN KEY ("centre_code") REFERENCES childcare_centres ("centre_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "government_subsidy_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the application */,
  "centre_code" TEXT /* Code of the childcare centre */,
  "subsidy_type" TEXT /* Type of subsidy applied for */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Name of the applicant */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Status of the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_government_subsidy_applications_centre_code FOREIGN KEY ("centre_code") REFERENCES childcare_centres ("centre_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "centre_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the staff member */,
  "centre_code" TEXT /* Code of the childcare centre */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member */,
  "qualifications" TEXT /* Qualifications of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_centre_staff_centre_code FOREIGN KEY ("centre_code") REFERENCES childcare_centres ("centre_code")
)
